case_title: MICHAEL QUAN VS. SKY DRAGON APPLIANCE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $160.00 FILED BY QUAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SKY DRAGON APPLIANCE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVED) SERVED OCT-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SKY DRAGON APPLIANCE INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SKY DRAGON APPLIANCE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUAN, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SKY DRAGON APPLIANCE INC. COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF DIDN'T ESTABLISH THE PRODUCT WAS DEFECTIVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY QUAN, MICHAEL SKY DRAGON APPLIANCE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER TOM LAM PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, MICHAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
